Process

Three steps to your pay stub

No sign-up required. Send details, preview, and download your professional pay stub instantly.

1

Requirement Gathering

Business info, employee info, pay period, salary or hourly rate, and any deductions.

→
2

Preview & verify

Our system calculates federal and state taxes. Review the preview before downloading.

→
3

Download instantly

Get a professionally formatted PDF in seconds. Print it, email it, or upload it wherever it's needed.

Features

Everything you need in a pay stub

Built for freelancers, contractors, small business owners, and employees seeking proof of income.

🧮

Tax calculation

Federal, state, Social Security, and Medicare taxes are calculated automatically based on your state and filing status.

📄

Professional PDF output

Clean, professional formatting that looks credible for landlords, banks, and loan applications.

🏢

All 50 states

Accurate state-specific tax rates for all 50 US states, updated regularly to stay current with tax law.

⚡

Instant download

No waiting, no email confirmation. Your pay stub is generated and ready to download in under 30 minutes.

🔒

Secure & private

SSL-encrypted. Your data is never stored or sold. Each session is private and cleared after download.

✏️

Custom deductions

Add health insurance, 401(k), Tips, and any custom deductions to match your real situation.

Pricing

Simple, transparent pricing

Pay only for what you need. No subscriptions, no hidden fees.

FAQ

Common questions

Is RapidPayStub legal to use? +
Yes. RapidPayStub generates pay stub documents for legitimate purposes such as proof of income for housing or loan applications. It is your responsibility to ensure the information you enter is accurate and truthful.
Are the tax calculations accurate? +
Yes. Our system uses current federal and state tax tables for all 50 US states, updated regularly. We calculate federal income tax, state income tax, Social Security (6.2%), and Medicare (1.45%) automatically.
How fast will I receive my pay stub? +
Instantly. Once you complete your order, you can download your pay stub PDF immediately.
Can I edit the pay stub after downloading? +
Pay stubs are generated as sealed PDFs. If you need changes, we will update them for you.
Is my personal information safe? +
Absolutely. All data is SSL-encrypted and we do not store your personal information. We never sell or share your data with third parties.
Do you support self-employed or 1099 workers? +
Yes. You can generate pay stubs as a self-employed individual, sole proprietor, or independent contractor. Simply enter your business name as the employer and your name as the employee.
